dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6808 : To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 417 West 7th Street in Columbia, Tennessee, as the “Pharmacist’s Mate First Class John Harlan Willis Post Office Building”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Received; read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs

form.official-title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 417 West 7th Street in Columbia, Tennessee, as the Pharmacist’s Mate First Class John Harlan Willis Post Office Building.

section.header: Pharmacist’s Mate First Class John Harlan Willis Post Office Building

subsection.text: The facility of the United States Postal Service located at 417 West 7th Street in Columbia, Tennessee, shall be known and designated as the Pharmacist’s Mate First Class John Harlan Willis Post Office Building.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the Pharmacist’s Mate First Class John Harlan Willis Post Office Building.

attestation-group.attestation-date: Passed the House of Representatives April 14, 2026.
